case_title: BROWN SANDRA VS SAFEWAY STORES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BROWN SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY STORES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-1995 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-24-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-13-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN SANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY STORES INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, DEFT TO PROVIDE CHECK TO PLTF WITHIN 7-10 WORKING DAYS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
